failures.name: ProjectsScreen > renders a row whose visible content is the project name only
ProjectsScreen > navigates to the project detail route when the row is pressed
ProjectsScreen > does not render a kebab menu on the row
ProjectsScreen > renders a partial-host-failure banner above the list, naming each failed host
ProjectsScreen > highlights the selected row when the active view targets a project
ProjectsScreen > does not include the word 'checkout' anywhere in the rendered tree
